title: The Cause of Najah b. Salamah 's Demise
description: I have received an account on the authority of al-Harith b. Abi Usamah, some of which I report on the basis of information from him and some from other informants:529 Najah b. Salamah was responsible for the Bureau of Registering and Supervising Government Officals (diwan al-tawgf wa-l-tatabbu` `ala al-`ummdl). Before this he had been secretary of Ibrahim b. Rabah al-Jawhari and was responsible for estates. The government officials all feared him and carried out his wishes, unable to deter him from doing whatever he wanted.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
